description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Wheels that runs on workflow dispatch, push, and published release events. In the buildpackage job, run on ubuntu-latest, check out the code, set up Python 3.8, install wheel and sdist requirements, build sdist and wheel, and upload the resulting distributions as artifacts. In the publish job, which depends on buildpackage and only runs on push to tags, download the artifacts, and publish them to PyPI using a GitHub Actions PyPI publish action with a provided PyPI password from secrets.
